title: garnotia depressa
intro: Garnotia depressa, also known as the Yellow-flowering Garnotia or Yellow Garnotia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to Australia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and aiding in digestion. In herbal preparations, Garnotia depressa is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, and can be consumed raw in small quantities under the guidance of a medical professional.
